summary: Comprehensive testing of Inventory Movement History and Audit Detail feature (Iteration 60). Fixed critical bug: historyItem reference error in SummaryStrip component. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend features verified: ItemHistoryModal opens from BalanceTable, balance summary strip shows On Hand/Incoming/Committed/Available, type breakdown badges are clickable to filter, reference filter works, movement history rows display Type/Effect/Reference/Source/Notes/Timestamp with display_effect enrichment.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history — returns movements in reverse chronological order
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history — display_effect field enrichment on all movements
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history — order_release sign flip (negative delta → positive display_effect)
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history — movement_type filter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history — reference filter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history — item filter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history — pagination (limit/offset) works correctly
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history — empty result for non-existent item (no server error)
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history/summary — returns per-type totals with count and total_qty
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history/summary — current_balances correct (on_hand=600, incoming=300, committed=150, available=750)
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history/summary — includes balance_details with per-bucket breakdown
REGRESSION: POST /api/inventory-ledger/reconcile-sales-order — still works
REGRESSION: POST /api/incoming-supply/from-shortage — still works (requires existing commitment)
REGRESSION: POST /api/incoming-supply/{id}/status — transitions still work (expected→ordered)
REGRESSION: POST /api/inventory-ledger/release — still works
Frontend: Login with admin/admin works
Frontend: Inventory Ledger page loads with customer workspace cards
Frontend: Hormel Foods workspace shows summary strip: 7 Items, 2,160 On Hand, 300 Incoming, 6,324 Committed, 3 Shortages
Frontend: Balances tab shows history icon on each row (data-testid='inv-history-btn-{i}')
Frontend: Click history icon opens ItemHistoryModal (data-testid='item-history-modal')
Frontend: Modal shows balance summary strip (data-testid='item-history-summary') with On Hand/Incoming/Committed/Available
Frontend: Modal shows type breakdown badges (data-testid='item-history-type-breakdown') - clickable to filter
Frontend: Modal shows movement history rows with Type/Effect/Reference/Source/Notes/Timestamp
Frontend: Type badge click filters history list (e.g., opening_balance filter reduces rows)
Frontend: Clear filter button appears when filter is active
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED BUG: historyItem/setHistoryItem were referenced in SummaryStrip but not passed as props - moved ItemHistoryModal to CustomerWorkspace component
_compute_display_effect correctly flips sign for order_release (negative delta → positive effect for UI display)
item_audit_summary correctly aggregates per-type totals via MongoDB aggregation pipeline
derive_balances formula verified: available = on_hand + incoming - committed
Frontend ItemHistoryModal fetches both history and summary endpoints in parallel for performance
seed_data_used: Each backend test class creates unique workspace with UUID prefix (TEST_HIST_*, TEST_SUMMARY_*, TEST_REGRESSION_*). Items seeded with opening_balance, order_commitment, order_release, receipt movements. Workspaces deactivated on teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: History/audit feature fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history?customer_id=X&item=Y&movement_type=Z&reference=R&limit=N&offset=M returns movements with display_effect enrichment (order_release sign is flipped). GET /api/inventory-ledger/history/summary?customer_id=X&item=Y returns per-type totals + current_balances. Frontend ItemHistoryModal opened from BalanceTable rows via ClipboardList icon (data-testid='inv-history-btn-{i}'). Modal has: balance summary strip, clickable type badges for filtering, reference input filter, paginated movement list. Bug fixed: moved ItemHistoryModal from SummaryStrip to CustomerWorkspace to fix historyItem reference error.

balance_table_history_icon.behavior: Opens ItemHistoryModal for the row's item

components.ref_filter: data-testid='item-history-ref-filter' - Input to filter by reference

bug_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: historyItem is not defined in SummaryStrip component
bug_fixed.cause: ItemHistoryModal and historyItem state were incorrectly placed inside SummaryStrip component instead of CustomerWorkspace
bug_fixed.fix: Moved ItemHistoryModal render to CustomerWorkspace component where historyItem state is defined
